page_metadata.biotools__summary: TROM (Transcriptome Overlap Measure) is an R package for comparing transcriptomes within or between different species, and provide a different perspective, in contrast to traditional correlation analyses, about capturing transcriptomic similarity.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TROM (Transcriptome Overlap Measure) is an R package for comparing transcriptomes within or between different species, and provide a different perspective, in contrast to traditional correlation analyses, about capturing transcriptomic similarity.
